name: User adds a private note on a client
description: User opens a client card and writes a private note — 'gate code is 4429, dog is friendly'. Note is internal only and never appears in customer-facing copy.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: Just left a job site, wants to capture details before he forgets.

steps.expect: Client detail / drawer shows a 'Notes' section labeled 'Private — never shown to customer'

steps.action: Types 'gate code 4429, dog is friendly' and saves
steps.expect: Note persists with timestamp and author; appears top of the notes list

steps.action: Generates an emailed quote for Patel
steps.expect: Note text is NOT included in the email or the public-quote page — verified by inspecting both

evaluationCriteria.check: 'Private' label is unmistakable — uses lock or eye-off icon, not just lighter text
Save is reflected immediately, no full-page reload
Notes are stored on a separate field that the customer-facing renderers explicitly do not read
Note textarea has a visible label; private-only warning is in the accessible name or description
